name: {number} Prompts de Estética Old Money
summary: Crea imágenes de estilo de vida lujoso, sofisticado y atemporal que transmiten riqueza, elegancia y gusto refinado. 📷 Nuestro libro de prompts meticulosamente elaborado ofrece {number} prompts probados y optimizados para Gemini, Nano Banana y Higgsfield, totalmente compatibles con las herramientas de Character Reference para resultados consistentes y auténticos. ⚡ Descarga digital instantánea.
description: Este completo libro de prompts contiene {number} prompts de IA meticulosamente diseñados para generar fotografías auténticas y sofisticadas con estética old money, que capturan la elegancia atemporal, el gusto refinado y el lujo sin esfuerzo.
prompt: A woman with loose Old Money hair sits at a small black café table on a Parisian square, wearing a luxurious cream tweed jacket and matching short skirt, dark oversized sunglasses, pearl stud earrings and a quilted cream handbag with gold chain on the table. She gently holds a porcelain espresso cup, Haussmann buildings blurred in the background. Soft daylight, muted tones and fine analog grain create an effortlessly chic city-luxury feel.
why: Professional luxury and lifestyle photography costs $2,000–$5,000+ per session. Add location scouting at exclusive estates, coastal properties, or international destinations; luxury styling and wardrobe coordination; professional hair and makeup; equipment rental; travel; and extensive post-production editing—you're looking at $8,000–$15,000+ for a comprehensive luxury content collection.And that's just for one aesthetic. Want to refresh your brand? Want different seasons, different destinations, different moods? You're back to investing thousands.But what if you could generate stunning, sophisticated old money aesthetic photos whenever you need them—instantly, for a fraction of the cost, with complete creative control? ✨
